name: bioethics_whistleblower_allegation_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A CRISPR therapy consent form omitted a long-tail risk that emerged in mice after enrollment closed. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics whistleblower allegation stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Inez Chandra
agents.identity: I am Inez Chandra, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Rahman
agents.identity: I am Priya Rahman, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Inez Chandra must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Inez Chandra do?
